tinker_description: I am Tinker, an at home service robot built by students at the Future Robotics Club in T H U. I move around on a four-wheel Agile X tracer mini base. I have one arm with a gripper and Realsense camera attatched. I also have an Orbbec camera mounted on the top of my aluminum framework to see the world better. I navigate using the livox LiDAR attached to my base. All my calculations are made on one laptop, which you can see have multiple cables connected to transfer signals. I was freshly built this January and this is my first time being in an arena with so many other robots.
